name: Jennifer Mostowski
ai_summary: Jennifer Mostowski has about five years of childcare experience, including high school volunteering and work mainly with infants and one-year-olds. She believes she'd be a great teacher because she's a 'big kid at heart' who gets involved in activities and shows children that learning can be fun.

transcripts.q3:
Hello, my name is Jennifer, Miss. Dusky, my experience and background, and child care is about five years. I also volunteered while attending High School. I also work with mainly infants and one-year-old, I enjoy working with the children because we both could still learn from one another. I enjoyed seeing their smiles, and their faces light up, when they learn something new, that they could bring home and share with their parents.
 We build a relationship with their children's each and every day that we work with they need consistency, it is very important that they see the same faces every day that you work with.
transcripts.q4: I live in Tucson Arizona, I do take the bus but I do know. The bus has been pretty. Well, I would need to stay on the east side of Tucson.
transcripts.q5:
I am seeking full-time employment but I can start with part-time.
 And move my way up.
transcripts.q6: If I have a conflict between two children in the classroom, I separate the two children. I talked calmly to both children and having to explain to me what's going on. I gave both children time to cool off. I explained to them. That no hating is allowed, no, throwing toys is allowed. That is not acceptable. That somebody could get seriously hurt and I had them apologize to each other.
transcripts.q7:
I think I would make a good up, kid, teacher, not only because my apparent myself. But I'm a big kid at heart. I dig down to the level. I get involved in the activities that they're doing.
 I play around with them as well.
 I show them that you can have fun. Not only be serious at times when necessary but you can still have fun.
